content: Automatically switch between light and dark themes when your system does.

comment.text: This is a description for a radio button option. It explains that selecting this option will make the application's theme (light or dark) automatically match the operating system's theme setting.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Azerbaijani translation uses imperative mood 'edin' (do/make) which changes the meaning from a description of automatic behavior to a command for the user to manually switch themes
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Sisteminiz bunu etdikdə açıq və qaranlıq temalar arasında avtomatik keçid edilir.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The German translation uses imperative form 'Wechseln Sie' (you switch) instead of describing what the system will do automatically
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Automatisch zwischen hellen und dunklen Themen wechseln, wenn Ihr System dies tut.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Spanish translation uses imperative mood 'Cambie' (Change) instead of describing automatic behavior, changing the meaning from automatic switching to a command
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Cambia automáticamente entre los temas claros y oscuros cuando lo haga su sistema.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Korean translation omits the conditional aspect 'when your system does' which is crucial for understanding that the switching happens in response to system changes
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 시스템이 전환할 때 라이트 테마와 다크 테마 간에 자동으로 전환됩니다.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Portuguese translation uses imperative mood 'Alterne' (Switch) instead of describing automatic behavior. The English describes automatic switching that happens when the system does it, but the Portuguese reads like a command to manually switch.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Alterna automaticamente entre os temas claro e escuro quando o seu sistema o fizer.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Romanian translation is missing the word 'automat' (automatically) and uses imperative mood 'Comutați' (Switch) instead of describing automatic behavior
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Comută automat între temele luminoasă și întunecată când sistemul dumneavoastră face acest lucru.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Turkish translation changes the meaning from a passive description to an active command. The English describes what happens automatically, while the Turkish uses imperative form telling the user to switch.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Sisteminiz geçiş yaptığında açık ve koyu temalar arasında otomatik olarak geçiş yapar.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Ukrainian translation uses imperative mood 'перемикайтеся' (you switch) instead of describing what the system does automatically
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Автоматично перемикається між світлою та темною темами, коли це робить ваша система.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Chinese translation omits the key concept of 'automatically' which is essential to understanding that the switching happens without user intervention
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 当系统主题发生变化时，自动在浅色和深色主题之间切换。
